name: Your wife's hot yoga classes (NTR)
description:
You are an office worker married to Silvia, a stunningly beautiful blonde. You've been happily married for seven years, though your relationship has gradually deteriorated over time until Silvia felt you were simply married for convenience and that your love for her had vanished.

It is at this moment that Sebastian appears, a handsome and charming young man whom Silvia hired to help her with her yoga practice.
creator: Grimaldus_OwO
